# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Prevent istio egress unrestricted.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.payment-provider.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "payment-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - analytics.thirdparty.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "analytics-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-notification-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.sendgrid.com
    - fcm.googleapis.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "notification-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-auth-provider
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - login.microsoftonline.com
    - accounts.google.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "auth-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - primary-db.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp-postgres
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "order-service"
    - "inventory-service"
  addresses:
    - 10.200.0.0/24
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-replica
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - replica-db.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp-postgres
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "reporting-service"
    - "analytics-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - cache-cluster.abc123.use1.cache.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 6379
      name: tcp-redis
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "api-gateway"
    - "session-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - cluster0-shard-00-00.mongodb.net
    - cluster0-shard-00-01.mongodb.net
    - cluster0-shard-00-02.mongodb.net
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 27017
      name: tcp-mongo
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "catalog-service"
    - "user-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: cloud-storage
spec:
  hosts:
    - s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
    - "*.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "media-service"
    - "backup-service"
---
# VirtualService for payment API with timeout, retries, and fault injection
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.payment-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "payment-service"
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.payment-provider.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.payment-provider.com
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100
  # HTTP-level routing if using egress gateway with TLS origination
  http:
    - timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 4s
        retryOn: connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable,cancelled,retriable-status-codes
        retryRemoteLocalities: true
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.payment-provider.com
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100
      headers:
        request:
          set:
            x-mesh-source: "payment-service"
---
# VirtualService for analytics API with rate limiting via timeout
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - analytics.thirdparty.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "analytics-service"
  http:
    - timeout: 15s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 6s
        retryOn: 5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream
      route:
        - destination:
            host: analytics.thirdparty.com
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100
---
# VirtualService for notification services with failover
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-notification-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.sendgrid.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "notification-service"
  http:
    - timeout: 8s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 3s
        retryOn: 5xx,connect-failure
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.sendgrid.com
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100
---
# VirtualService for database primary with strict timeout
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - primary-db.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "order-service"
    - "inventory-service"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: primary-db.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 5432
          weight: 100
---
# VirtualService for database replica
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-postgres-replica
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - replica-db.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "reporting-service"
    - "analytics-service"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: replica-db.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 5432
          weight: 100
---
# VirtualService for Redis cache
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - cache-cluster.abc123.use1.cache.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "api-gateway"
    - "session-service"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 6379
      route:
        - destination:
            host: cache-cluster.abc123.use1.cache.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 6379
          weight: 100
---
# DestinationRule for payment API with TLS origination and connection pool
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: api.payment-provider.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "payment-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.payment-provider.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 5s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
# DestinationRule for analytics API
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: analytics.thirdparty.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "analytics-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: analytics.thirdparty.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 30
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 50
        maxRetries: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 120s
---
# DestinationRule for PostgreSQL primary
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: primary-db.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "order-service"
    - "inventory-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: primary-db.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 3s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
---
# DestinationRule for PostgreSQL replica
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-postgres-replica
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: replica-db.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "reporting-service"
    - "analytics-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: replica-db.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 200
        connectTimeout: 3s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
---
# DestinationRule for Redis
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: cache-cluster.abc123.use1.cache.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "api-gateway"
    - "session-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 150
        connectTimeout: 2s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 30s
          probes: 5
---
# DestinationRule for MongoDB with mutual TLS
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: cluster0-shard-00-00.mongodb.net
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "catalog-service"
    - "user-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: cluster0-shard-00-00.mongodb.net
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 80
        connectTimeout: 5s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 9
---
# Sidecar resource to restrict egress from specific namespaces
# This prevents unrestricted egress by limiting which services
# each namespace can reach
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: payment-service-sidecar
  namespace: payment-service
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/api.payment-provider.com"
        - "istio-system/*"
        - "./payment-service.payment-service.svc.cluster.local"
      port:
        number: 443
        protocol: TLS
        name: egress-https
    - hosts:
        - "./*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: order-service-sidecar
  namespace: order-service
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/primary-db.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com"
        - "./*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: analytics-service-sidecar
  namespace: analytics-service
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/analytics.thirdparty.com"
        - "istio-system/replica-db.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com"
        - "./*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: notification-service-sidecar
  namespace: notification-service
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/api.sendgrid.com"
        - "istio-system/fcm.googleapis.com"
        - "./*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default-restrictive-sidecar
  namespace: default
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "./*"
        - "istio-system/*"
---
# Mesh-wide default: block all egress not explicitly allowed
# This is the key configuration to prevent unrestricted egress
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: mesh-default-sidecar
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "./*"
        - "istio-system/*"
---
# AuthorizationPolicy to restrict which workloads can access external services
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: restrict-external-payment-access
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - payment-service
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/payment-service/sa/payment-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - api.payment-provider.com
            ports:
              - "443"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: restrict-external-db-access
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - order-service
              - inventory-service
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/order-service/sa/order-service-sa"
              - "cluster.local/ns/inventory-service/sa/inventory-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - primary-db.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
            ports:
              - "5432"
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - reporting-service
              - analytics-service
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - replica-db.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
            ports:
              - "5432"
---
# Deny-all policy as a safety net for egress
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-egress-default
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: DENY
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            notNamespaces:
              - payment-service
              - order-service
              - inventory-service
              - analytics-service
              - notification-service
              - reporting-service
              - auth-service
              - api-gateway
              - session-service
              - catalog-service
              - user-service
              - media-service
              - backup-service
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - "*.amazonaws.com"
              - "*.mongodb.net"
              - "api.payment-provider.com"
              - "analytics.thirdparty.com"
              - "api.sendgrid.com"
              - "fcm.googleapis.com"
